name: Upload4Earn
verification_notes: Upload4Earn is active, but the current public trail clearly frames it as an earn-from-downloads file host. Its site summaries emphasize making money from uploads rather than a neutral file-sharing product, so it fails the curation bar for the verified list.

verification_references.label: WJunction discussion about Upload4Earn payout behavior

name: UploadBox
verification_notes: UploadBox has a live domain trail, but the current public evidence is too thin and ambiguous to support it as a trustworthy verified host. Current summaries reduce it to a generic ?Mega File? identity with weak product detail, and some public checks cannot even see a configured web server. That keeps it out of the verified list.

name: UploadBoy
verification_notes: The official site openly promotes premium plans, affiliate-style earning programs, and reseller flows, which puts it outside the repo's curation bar.

name: UploadCD
verification_notes: Upload.cd no longer presents a functioning file-hosting service. Current public domain checks show no web server configured, so it is not a valid active host for the verified list.

verification_references.label: IPAddress summary for upload.cd showing no configured web server

name: UploadCloud
verification_notes: UploadCloud is active, but its own current pages openly show the classic premium-locker structure: premium accounts, reseller terms, referral commissions, anonymous/free expiry windows, and a free-versus-premium capability split. That fails the curation bar for the verified list.

name: Uploaded
verification_notes: Uploaded is no longer a trustworthy current host for the verified list. Multiple contemporaneous reports in late 2022 described the service shutting down permanently, and the modern public trail is mostly residual uptime and premium-link-generator traces rather than a healthy current product.

verification_references.label: TorrentFreak report on Uploaded.net permanent shutdown
Ultima Hora report on Uploaded.net closure
PrimeLeech Uploaded.net generator page showing residual premium-leech ecosystem

name: Uploadev
verification_notes: UploadEv is active, but the current public trail explicitly describes it as a file host where users upload files and earn money from downloads. That payout-oriented positioning fails the curation bar for the verified list.

name: UploadGig
verification_notes: The official service openly presents premium packages, reseller access, and affiliate tooling, which places it in the premium-locker category rather than the curated verified list.

name: Uploadify
verification_notes: Uploadify currently presents itself as a host where users can earn from downloads, and the current public trail frames it as a PPD-style file host rather than the kind of neutral file-sharing service we want in the verified list.

verification_references.label: IPAddress summary for uploadify.net showing site title and meta description
Trustpilot review mentioning prior PPD behavior

name: UploadOcean
verification_notes: UploadOcean no longer looks like a trustworthy current file host. The current domain surface is repurposed into unrelated gambling-style content, and supporting domain summaries no longer show a clean product identity. That makes it invalid for the verified list.

verification_references.label: Current uploadocean.com page showing unrelated gambling-style content
IPAddress summary for uploadocean.com showing host mismatch to heartbd2k.org

name: UploadProper
verification_notes: UploadProper no longer looks like a dependable current file host. Recent public traces show the domain returning 503 errors, and newer domain summaries indicate the name has drifted into unrelated gambling content. That makes it an invalid current host for the verified list.

verification_references.label: ScamAdviser summary for uploadproper.net showing file-host title but 503 status
IPAddress summary showing current uploadproper.net title as gambling content

name: UploadRar
verification_notes: UploadRar is active, but its own current pages clearly expose a premium-locker and payout-host model: premium tiers, premium-pro tiers, downloader restrictions, short free retention, and explicit earn-money download rates. That fails the curation bar for the verified list.

verification_references.label: Uploadrar example download page showing free vs premium limits

name: UploadSt
verification_notes: Upload.st still has traces of a file-host identity in public summaries, but the modern evidence is too weak and stale for the verified list. The accessible trail is mostly old uptime snapshots and generic third-party descriptions rather than a strong current product surface.

verification_references.label: NotOpening status for upload.st showing only 2021 uptime history
SitePrice competitor page preserving the generic Upload.st file-host description
IPAddress similar-domain result showing modern ambiguity around upload.st references

name: UPPIT
verification_notes: Uppit no longer presents a functioning file-hosting product. The current official surface is just a ?Coming soon!? Discourse shell, so it is not a valid active host for the verified list.

name: Upstore
verification_notes: The current public Upstore trail centers on premium upgrades, affiliate commissions, and heavily constrained free use rather than a trustworthy modern host we want to recommend. That makes it a poor fit for the verified list.

name: UptoBox
verification_notes: UptoBox was shut down in 2023 after enforcement action and server seizures. That makes it a historical host rather than a valid active service for the verified list.

verification_references.label: TorrentFreak report on Uptobox shutdown and legal aftermath
Arcom decision registering Uptobox on the piracy-watch list

name: UsersCloud
verification_notes: UsersCloud belongs to the premium-host / leech-generator ecosystem rather than the curated verified list we are building. The modern public trail is dominated by premium-link-generator support and poor reputation reports, which is enough to keep it out of the verified set.

name: vShare
verification_notes: The original vshare.io lead no longer points to a dependable active host. Current public checks show it parked on Bodis with generic ?relevant content? behavior, and downtime trackers report it as down. That makes the lead invalid for the verified list.

verification_references.label: ScamAdviser summary for vshare.io showing parked-domain behavior

name: WdFiles
verification_notes: WdFiles is active, but its own current pages show a classic premium-cyberlocker pattern and public warez-style indexing, including pirated software and infected files. That fails the curation bar for the verified list.

verification_references.label: WdFiles folder page with bootleg media archive listings
WdFiles folder page showing pirated software and infected files

name: WebchinUpload
verification_notes: The old WebchinUpload file-host links still appear across web archives and forum posts, but the current domain trail has drifted into parking infrastructure rather than a trustworthy active host. That makes it invalid for the verified list.

verification_references.label: Robtex record showing webchinupload.com on Above.com parking-style nameservers
Historic Webchin forum post using webchinupload.com file links

name: WupFile
verification_notes: The official site openly promotes premium membership, reseller access, and a make-money program, which puts it outside the repo's curation bar.

name: WuShare
verification_notes: WuShare still has an active-looking domain footprint, but the current public trail is dominated by premium-link-generator and premium-host language, with additional caution flags from reputation services. That places it outside the repo's verified-host curation bar.

name: ZippyShare
verification_notes: ZippyShare posted an official farewell notice and shut down in March 2023.

name: Zofile
verification_notes: Zofile remains file-host-like, but current public checks show it without valid HTTPS, which fails the repo?s verified-host bar. Other current domain summaries also suggest drift into unrelated content, so it does not make the verified list.

verification_references.label: ScamAdviser summary for zofile.com showing no valid SSL certificate
IPAddress summary for zofile.com showing redirect to unrelated vfxdownload content
